name: Moroccan Salmon Cakes with Garlic Mayonnaise
intro: This is a great alternative to the standard salmon patty recipe using couscous, spinach, and cumin for an exotic flavor.

ingredients.item: (14.75 ounces) of can red salmon, drained
(10 ounces) of package frozen chopped spinach - thawed, drained, and squeezed dry

method: In a small stainless steel or glass bowl, stir together mayonnaise, garlic, and paprika. Set aside.
Prepare couscous according to package directions using the 2/3 cup of orange juice in place of water .
In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked couscous, red salmon, drained spinach, egg yolks, garlic, cumin, black pepper, and salt. Form into patties.
In a large skillet over medium heat, heat the olive oil and fry patties until golden brown, turning once, about 8 to 10 minutes. Serve with garlic mayonnaise.
